visual_description: The blond-haired man peeks around a stone column with a startled expression, then darts away in a hurried motion. Two men in dark uniforms crouch nearby, one extending a hand as if urging another forward, while Chinese subtitles indicate an urgent call. The scene shifts to a shadowy figure moving through a dimly lit stone doorway.
audio_description: Urgent spoken words in Chinese are heard, accompanied by hurried movement sounds.
